name: Paper Broker
description: Simulated broker connector for dry-run order execution, portfolio checks, and strategy trading tests.

initialCash.description: Initial paper trading cash balance, for example 100000.

market.description: Default market scope, for example CN-A, HK, US, or CRYPTO.

currency.description: Paper trading account currency, for example USD, CNY, or HKD.

allowShort.description: Whether simulated sell orders can open short positions. Disabled by default.

requireConfirmation.description: Whether place_order requires confirmed=true after explicit user confirmation. Enabled by default.
